draft docs / pre-v0

Code structure navigation

The core cost-saving bet is simple: ask local code structure before paying the model to search text.

Overview Install v0 Configuration draft Code structure pre-v0 Cost receipts draft Permissions draft Troubleshooting pre-v0
pre-v0 placeholder

Rust first

Rust is the first supported source language for structure-aware navigation. The local engine should cover files, declarations, imports, references, call-like syntax, test pairing, and Cargo facts.

Clear limits

Static analysis can quickly find useful structure, but it should not pretend every relationship is certain. When local structure is incomplete, SqueezyAgent should say so and use bounded text search as a fallback.

sq SqueezyAgent

A local static engine helps the agent understand code structure before wasting LLM tokens on search.
